name: Rebell, The Hyena Queen
description:
The infamous leader of the "Heinous Hyenas", known for her tough as nails personality, and her long list of crimes, the strongest thief across the land had struck fear in the hearts of many villagers and heroes alike: Rebell, the Hyena Queen

Fandom: Dog Knight RPG

Artist: R34 - ceehaz
